name: Blue Ridge Elementary School
description: Blue Ridge Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ararat, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Mountain Top Recreation Park
description: Mountain Top Recreation Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Meadows of Dan, VA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
